name: Ningbo Yunsheng  Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Yunsheng Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of rare earth permanent magnet materials in China. It provides sintered NdFeB and bonded NdFeB magnets; servo motors; and magnetic components, including rare earth permanent magnet radiation rings, flat rotor assemblies, laminated steel assemblies, permanent magnet rotor assemblies, and high-speed precision rotor assemblies. The company's products are used in electronic information, industrial equipment, automotive, medical, and other fields. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, and Southeast Asian countries. Ningbo Yunsheng Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Ningbo, China.
